message:
Enhance parser recursion depth tracking and add local alias lookup

Extend the recursion depth guard to cover parse_statement_inner() and
parse_select_stmt(), which were previously unguarded entry points that
could allow deeply nested compound statements to blow the stack.

- Wrap parse_statement_inner() body with enter_recursion/leave_recursion
- Extract parse_select_stmt_inner() and guard the public entry point
  with recursion depth tracking
- Reformat the MAX_PARSE_DEPTH error message for rustfmt compliance
- Add Scope::has_alias_local() for checking whether an alias is defined
  in the current scope only (without traversing parent scopes), needed
  for disambiguating local CTEs from inherited aliases

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
